{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Account Manager",
  "description": "OmniRetail is a unified consumer goods distribution platform that improves the inefficiencies of traditional trade by digitising the key stakeholders through its stellar products; OmniBiz, the B2B e-commerce platform; and Mplify, a Distribution Management Solution that helps FMCG distributors drive growth by automating their sales and inventory on a best-in-class technology stack. OmniPay is the embedded finance solution for OmniBiz and Mplify.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Account Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Kubwa, Bwari, Dawaki, Dei Dei, Zuba, Tungamaje, Gwa gwa, Jiwa, Karimo, Gwarimpa, Dutse, Jabi, Utako, Katampe, Mpape, and Lugbe - Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Identifying and onboarding new retailers and Omniclub Members into the OmniRetail ecosystem.
	Managing relationships with assigned retailers and ensuring continued engagement and purchases.
	Educating retailers on how to use the OmniBiz app and other value added services
	Conducting daily field visits and meetings with retailers within the assigned territory.
	Ensuring accurate onboarding of customers and proper completion of KYC requirements.
	Monitoring and supporting active customers to maintain regular purchases.
	Submitting daily activity reports
	Resolving customer complaints and escalating issues when necessary.
	Participating in periodic trainings, reviews, and performance assessments organized by the company.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@omniretail.africa&nbsp;using &quot;CAM - Your Location&quot; as the subject of the mail. For&nbsp;example: &quot;CAM - kubwa&quot;.",

  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "OmniRetail Technology Limited"
    
  },

Customer Account Manager Job at OmniRetail Technology Limited




        
    

        
        OmniRetail is a unified consumer goods distribution platform that improves the inefficiencies of traditional trade by digitising the key stakeholders through its stellar products; OmniBiz, the B2B e-commerce platform; and Mplify, a Distribution Management Solution that helps FMCG distributors drive growth by automating their sales and inventory on a best-in-class technology stack. OmniPay is the embedded finance solution for OmniBiz and Mplify.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Account Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Locations: Kubwa, Bwari, Dawaki, Dei Dei, Zuba, Tungamaje, Gwa gwa, Jiwa, Karimo, Gwarimpa, Dutse, Jabi, Utako, Katampe, Mpape, and Lugbe - Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Identifying and onboarding new retailers and Omniclub Members into the OmniRetail ecosystem.
	Managing relationships with assigned retailers and ensuring continued engagement and purchases.
	Educating retailers on how to use the OmniBiz app and other value added services
	Conducting daily field visits and meetings with retailers within the assigned territory.
	Ensuring accurate onboarding of customers and proper completion of KYC requirements.
	Monitoring and supporting active customers to maintain regular purchases.
	Submitting daily activity reports
	Resolving customer complaints and escalating issues when necessary.
	Participating in periodic trainings, reviews, and performance assessments organized by the company.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@omniretail.africa using "CAM - Your Location" as the subject of the mail. For example: "CAM - kubwa".    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Care Officer (NYSC)",
  "description": "Naji Realties is a leading hospitality and real estate company in Nigeria, dedicated to providing exceptional services and experiences that exceed our customers&#39; expectations. With a strong presence in Abuja and Lagos, our experts are passionate about delivering top-notch solutions in property development, management, and hospitality.

If you share our values and passion for excellence, we invite you to explore career opportunities with us. At Naji Realties, we foster a culture of growth, learning, and collaboration. Be part of our dynamic team and help us shape the future of hospitality and real estate in Nigeria

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Officer (NYSC)

Job Location:&nbsp;Guzape, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: NYSC

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly skilled and enthusiastic Customer Care Officer to join our hospitality team. As the first point of contact for our guests, you will be responsible for delivering exceptional customer service, ensuring a warm and welcoming experience, and providing efficient front desk service


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests, respond to their inquiries, and resolve any issues promptly
	Manage room assignments, check-in, and check-out processes
	Handle guest registrations, payments, and departures
	Maintain accurate records of guest information, room assignments, and billing
	Provide personalized support and recommendations to guests
	Coordinate with other departments to ensure seamless service delivery
	Resolve guest complaints and issues in a fair, prompt, and professional manner
	Maintain a clean and organized front desk area
	Participate in training and coaching to enhance customer service skills


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Social Sciences or equivalent required with a minimum of 2 years of customer service experience preferably in a hospitality industry
	Must reside in Abuja preferably around Utako
	Excellent communication, listening, and problem-solving skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and adapt to changing priorities
	Strong patience, empathy, and understanding
	Proficiency in computer software and technology
	Ability to work varying shifts, including evenings and weekends.


Salary
N50,000 - N80,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to:&nbsp;careers@najirealties.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Customer Care Officer (NYSC) Job at Naji Realties




        
    

        
        Naji Realties is a leading hospitality and real estate company in Nigeria, dedicated to providing exceptional services and experiences that exceed our customers' expectations. With a strong presence in Abuja and Lagos, our experts are passionate about delivering top-notch solutions in property development, management, and hospitality.

If you share our values and passion for excellence, we invite you to explore career opportunities with us. At Naji Realties, we foster a culture of growth, learning, and collaboration. Be part of our dynamic team and help us shape the future of hospitality and real estate in Nigeria

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Officer (NYSC)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Guzape, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: NYSC

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly skilled and enthusiastic Customer Care Officer to join our hospitality team. As the first point of contact for our guests, you will be responsible for delivering exceptional customer service, ensuring a warm and welcoming experience, and providing efficient front desk service


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests, respond to their inquiries, and resolve any issues promptly
	Manage room assignments, check-in, and check-out processes
	Handle guest registrations, payments, and departures
	Maintain accurate records of guest information, room assignments, and billing
	Provide personalized support and recommendations to guests
	Coordinate with other departments to ensure seamless service delivery
	Resolve guest complaints and issues in a fair, prompt, and professional manner
	Maintain a clean and organized front desk area
	Participate in training and coaching to enhance customer service skills


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Social Sciences or equivalent required with a minimum of 2 years of customer service experience preferably in a hospitality industry
	Must reside in Abuja preferably around Utako
	Excellent communication, listening, and problem-solving skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and adapt to changing priorities
	Strong patience, empathy, and understanding
	Proficiency in computer software and technology
	Ability to work varying shifts, including evenings and weekends.


Salary
N50,000 - N80,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: careers@najirealties.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Production Assistant / Outlet Attendant",
  "description": "Fresh2Go Smoothie &amp; Co. is a fast growing food and beverage brand focused on delivering fresh, tasty, and affordable meals and drinks. We operate multiple outlets and specialize in smoothies, milkshakes, sandwiches, shawarma, parfaits, burgers, and other ready to eat meals made with quality ingredients.

Our company is driven by a strong commitment to hygiene, customer satisfaction, and operational excellence. We create a dynamic and supportive work environment where teamwork, innovation, and personal growth are encouraged. At Fresh2Go, employees are valued as key contributors to our success, and we are passionate about building a brand that customers trust and talents are proud to be part of.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Production Assistant / Outlet Attendant

Job Location:&nbsp;Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Preparation of customers&#39; orders.
	Assisting in checking stocks and informing the supervisor when supplies are low
	Interact politely with customers when necessary and maintain professionalism
	Following the safety and hygiene requirements of the company
	Cleaning &amp; sanitizing the food preparation area.


Requirement


	Interested candidates should possess an NCE, OND or HND qualification with relevant work experience.
	Must be responsible, neat, and presentable
	Reliable and efficient.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;oluwatomisin668@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Production Assistant / Outlet Attendant Job at Fresh2Go Smoothie & Co




        
    

        
        Fresh2Go Smoothie & Co. is a fast growing food and beverage brand focused on delivering fresh, tasty, and affordable meals and drinks. We operate multiple outlets and specialize in smoothies, milkshakes, sandwiches, shawarma, parfaits, burgers, and other ready to eat meals made with quality ingredients.

Our company is driven by a strong commitment to hygiene, customer satisfaction, and operational excellence. We create a dynamic and supportive work environment where teamwork, innovation, and personal growth are encouraged. At Fresh2Go, employees are valued as key contributors to our success, and we are passionate about building a brand that customers trust and talents are proud to be part of.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Assistant / Outlet Attendant

Job Location: Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Preparation of customers' orders.
	Assisting in checking stocks and informing the supervisor when supplies are low
	Interact politely with customers when necessary and maintain professionalism
	Following the safety and hygiene requirements of the company
	Cleaning & sanitizing the food preparation area.


Requirement


	Interested candidates should possess an NCE, OND or HND qualification with relevant work experience.
	Must be responsible, neat, and presentable
	Reliable and efficient.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: oluwatomisin668@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is the most sought-after Human Resource Solution Provider with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Assistant - Timekeeper Experience

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Operations Assistant with proven timekeeping experience to support our client&#39;s daily operational activities within a fast-paced FMCG environment.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for assisting in operational coordination, maintaining accurate workforce attendance records, and supporting productivity tracking to ensure smooth and efficient plant or warehouse operations.


Requirements


	HND or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Operations Management, or a related field.
	Must have 2 years of experience in an Operations Assistant or Timekeeping role within an FMCG or manufacturing.
	Hands-on experience in employee timekeeping and attendance management is mandatory.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cv@ascentech.com.ng&nbsp;using Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "title": "Secretary / Executive Assistant",
  "description": "IonWorx Limited is at the forefront of the renewable energy revolution in Nigeria, specializing in Solar Equipment Sales, Installation, and Services. With a strong commitment to enhancing the adoption of solar energy across the region, IonWorx has established itself as a key player in making sustainable energy accessible and reliable.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary / Executive Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a dedicated Female Executive Assistant to provide high-level administrative support to our executive team.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage executive schedules, appointments, and travel arrangements
	Handle correspondence, calls, and emails professionally
	Prepare reports, presentations, and meeting minutes
	Coordinate office logistics and maintain confidentiality


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Candidates should possess an SSCE / OND / HND / Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, or related field preferred
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
	Good grasp of AI tools.
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities
	Discretion, reliability, and a proactive attitude
	Must reside close to the Ojodu Berger axis, Lagos.
	Previous experience as an Executive/Personal Assistant is an advantage.


Starting&nbsp;Salary
N60,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV and a brief Cover Letter to:&nbsp;ionworxlimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Executive Assistant&quot; as the subject of the email.

Secretary / Executive Assistant Job at IonWorx Limited




        
    

        
        IonWorx Limited is at the forefront of the renewable energy revolution in Nigeria, specializing in Solar Equipment Sales, Installation, and Services. With a strong commitment to enhancing the adoption of solar energy across the region, IonWorx has established itself as a key player in making sustainable energy accessible and reliable.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary / Executive Assistant

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dedicated Female Executive Assistant to provide high-level administrative support to our executive team.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage executive schedules, appointments, and travel arrangements
	Handle correspondence, calls, and emails professionally
	Prepare reports, presentations, and meeting minutes
	Coordinate office logistics and maintain confidentiality


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Candidates should possess an SSCE / OND / HND / Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, or related field preferred
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
	Good grasp of AI tools.
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities
	Discretion, reliability, and a proactive attitude
	Must reside close to the Ojodu Berger axis, Lagos.
	Previous experience as an Executive/Personal Assistant is an advantage.


Starting Salary
N60,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV and a brief Cover Letter to: ionworxlimited@gmail.com using "Application for Executive Assistant" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only female applicants residing near Ojodu Berger should apply.
